prose.en: Plan and conduct routine incident response exercises and scenarios for key personnel involved in the incident response process to prepare for responding to real-world incidents. Exercises need to test communication channels, decision making, and workflows. Conduct testing on an annual basis, at a minimum.
Routine incident response exercises and scenarios are planned and conducted for key personnel involved in the incident response process to prepare for responding to real-world incidents.
The exercises test communication channels, decision-making, and workflows.
Testing is conducted on an annual basis, at a minimum.
